_note: Seed baseline for the vision-eval ratchet (autonomous-build-4vj.4). blessed:false makes the ratchet a quiet SKIP (report-only) — exactly like a missing jankurai baseline. To BLESS: run the workflow over the full corpus at a representative K and bless the result, e.g. `Workflow vision-eval --k 5 --update-baseline`; review the emitted numbers; then commit the rewritten file in a DEDICATED commit (mirrors the jankurai baseline discipline in hooks/post-build-gate.sh). --update-baseline overwrites this whole object with a real scorecard carrying blessed:true. Until then no regression can trip the gate, because there is no blessed reference to regress against.
